name: El Pollo Loco Holdings, Inc.
summary: Our Company We opened our first location on Alvarado Street in LosAngeles, California, in 1980, and have grown our restaurant system to 503 domestic restaurants, comprised of 175company-operated and 328 franchised restaurants as of December31,2025. Our restaurants are located principally in California, but also in Arizona, Nevada, Texas, Utah, Colorado, Washington and Louisiana.
